metadata.description: cogyard is its own marketplace: the Claude Code driver for the task system ships in-repo as the `cogyard` plugin. The plugin is self-contained (skills/hooks call the `cogyard` CLI on PATH), so it installs cleanly as a local OR remote marketplace. Install the engine separately: `npm i -g @cogyard/cli` (or `npm link` in a clone).

plugins.name: cogyard
plugins.description: Drive cogyard from Claude Code: pickup-task / write-task / handoff / commit / debt-cleanup skills, the /cogyard portal command, and the worktree-wiring + frontmatter-validator + task-skill hooks.
